text:
There once was a boy named Robin.

Robin lived in a forest.

Robin loved animals.

Every day Robin woke up early just to go pet animals.

One day Robin saw an owl.

The owl swooped down and stole Robin's favourite hat. Robin searched everywhere.

Afternoon came.

Robin came across something shiny.

It wasn't an owl. It was a shiny new broomstick.

Robin took it home.

Robin practiced flying.

After a week Robin could fly ten feet.

Robin became famous.

That evening at supper Robin stole his father's hat.

Everyone laughed.

Robin slept soundly.


That night an owl flew past Robin's bedroom window.

Just a twig cracked.

Suddenly every feather fell.


Robin woke up screaming.

His brothers and sisters came running.

There wasn't an owl.

Just an unexpected gust.

Robin never fell victim again.

He lived happily ever after.



Thanks.



The owl flew away.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
